summary: The protagonist, a streamer, receives information from his brother about a mysterious figure called the Hyuncheon Moon and initiates a quest to investigate his connection to the Milyeong Unit. After discovering the Milyeong Unit is linked to a secret organization, the protagonist infiltrates the Sung-ho Fortress, battling bandits to uncover the truth. He eventually identifies the fortress chief, Yugum, as a member of the Milyeong Unit, defeats him, and discovers a ledger that provides further insight into the Hyuncheon Moon's past activities.
key_moments: The protagonist learns about the Hyuncheon Moon and receives a quest to investigate the Milyeong Unit.
The protagonist infiltrates the Sung-ho Fortress and defeats the bandits under the command of the Black Mountain League.
The protagonist exposes the fortress chief Yugum as part of the Milyeong Unit, defeats him, and finds a incriminating ledger.
